quotation.title: Tim khong gian lam viec phu hop
quotation.text: Cho du ban can cho ngoi, van phong rieng hay nguyen tang, Amitie Office deu co giai phap linh hoat de ho tro su phat trien cua doi ngu ban.

home.heroTitle: Van phong tiep theo cua ban, san sang ngay hom nay
home.heroText: Van phong rieng, cho ngoi chia se, phong hop - day du moi thu doi ngu cua ban can trong mot noi.
home.benefitTitle1: Van phong thong minh, day du tien nghi
home.benefitText1: Nang cao hieu suat doi ngu voi khong gian linh hoat cho doanh nghiep hien dai. Tu internet toc do cao, phong hop chuyen nghiep, xu ly thu tin den ho tro hanh chinh theo yeu cau, Amitie Office cung cap day du de ban van hanh de dang va hieu qua.
home.benefitText2: Tai Amitie Office, chung toi hieu moi doanh nghiep co nhu cau rieng. Vi vay, chung toi cung cap giai phap van phong mo rong linh hoat, goi ngan han hoac dai han va dich vu tuy chinh theo muc tieu tang truong cua ban.

footer.contactToday: Lien he voi chung toi ngay hom nay
footer.hoursClosed: Nghi Chu Nhat va ngay le

location.choiceText: Khong gian chuyen nghiep voi 11 tang van phong rieng va van phong dich vu.
location.choiceItem2: Toa nha day du dich vu
location.strengthLocationText: Toa lac tai khu vuc trung tam, thuan tien giao thong va di chuyen den cac quan huyen. Khu vuc tap trung nhieu toa nha van phong va tien ich xung quanh.
location.strengthBuildingText: Khu vuc an ninh cao, camera giam sat, he thong bao chay, quan ly ra vao bang van tay, bai xe rong va gia canh tranh.

info.title: Van phong rieng
info.description: Van phong rieng da trang bi day du tai vi tri trung tam, phu hop cho doi ngu can su rieng tu, linh hoat va ha tang san sang.
